tools.name: jpcite_route
tools.purpose: Choose the cheapest sufficient route and return whether a paid packet is justified.

tools.name: jpcite_preview_cost
tools.purpose: Return max price, likely coverage, known gaps, and no-hit caveat before purchase.

tools.name: jpcite_execute_packet
tools.purpose: Create an accepted artifact only with a scoped cap token and idempotency key.

tools.name: jpcite_get_packet
tools.purpose: Retrieve an already-created packet, source receipts, and known gaps.
